name: Project Sync / Status Update
description: Weekly or bi-weekly project status meeting focusing on milestones and risks.

sections.title: Milestones & Status
sections.instruction: Every milestone discussed with its current status and any dates or timelines mentioned. Capture all details given.

sections.title: Progress Summary
sections.instruction: Complete record of all progress discussed since the last sync. Include every detail mentioned — do not condense.

sections.title: Top Risks & Mitigations
sections.instruction: Every risk, concern, or issue raised, with its impact and any mitigation or response discussed.

sections.title: Key Decisions
sections.instruction: Every decision made or discussed in this meeting, with the reasoning given and any timestamps mentioned.

sections.title: Action Items
sections.instruction: Every action item or next step identified. Describe each action clearly and specifically. Include any deadlines mentioned. Do NOT assign owners — focus on what needs to be done.

sections.title: Related Documents
sections.instruction: Any documents, tickets, links, or external references mentioned during the meeting.
